svg.title: ProactaSLO system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Data flows from synthetic mesh through Prometheus and ingestion into Redis, then through LSTM prediction and Kafka topics to alerting and feedback loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the synthetic mesh generate metrics?')
sendPrompt('What does Istio contribute to ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does Prometheus collect in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('How does metric ingestion work in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('How does the LSTM prediction engine work in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('What is the SLO registry in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI layer work in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('What is the violation-alerts Kafka topic?')
sendPrompt('What is the model-feedback Kafka topic?')
sendPrompt('What is the audit-log Kafka topic?')
sendPrompt('How does PagerDuty alerting work in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('How does the feedback consumer work in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('How does the nightly retrainer work in ProactaSLO?')
sendPrompt('What does the Grafana dashboard show in ProactaSLO?')
